calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-18-2015 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk EBura; Proceedings not reported. (610)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-18-2015 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Aug-18-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve And Enter Consent Judgment Between Plaintiff Consumer Advocacy Group, Inc. And Defendant Fitness Em, Llc
Off Calendar May-01-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. NATHAN DeVRIES OF YEROUSHALMI & ASSOCIATES, TEL. NO. (310) 623-1926 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE;
ATTY. ELIZABETH V. MCNULTY OF ARCHER NORRIS LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. (949) 975-8200 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED REGARDING THE ISSUES RAISED BY THE COURT REGARDING DHP, ATTY'S FEE AND THE DANGER OF THE PRODUCT TO CHILDREN AND THE ELDERLY. PLAINTIFF CONSUMER ADVOCACY GROUP, INC.'S Motion To Approve And Enter Consent Judgment Between Plaintiff Consumer Advocacy Group, Inc. And Defendant Fitness EM, LLC. is taken under submission as to atty's fee. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Denise Doucette, CSR # 5963 =(302/EHG)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve And Enter Consent Judgment Between Plaintiff Consumer Advocacy Group, Inc. And Defendant Fitness Em, Llc
Off Calendar Apr-01-2015 Continued To May-01-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. JASON GIANVECCHIO of Yeroushalmi & Associates, Tel No. (310) 623-1926 appearing telephonically for Plaintiff Consumer Advocacy Group, Inc.;
Atty. ELIZABETH V. MCNULTY of Archer Norris, Tel No. (949) 975-8200 appearing telephonically for Defendants Fitness EM, LLC, Fitness Equipment Manufacturing, LLC, and Ross Stores, Inc. dba DD's Discounts.

Argument presented by counsel. PLAINTIFF CONSUMER ADVOCACY GROUP, INC.'S Motion To Approve And Enter Consent Judgment Between Plaintiff Consumer Advocacy Group, Inc. and Defendant Fitness EM, LLC is continued to May 1, 2015 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302. Parties' current papers do not provide the Court with accessible information, detail or structure re: DEHP. Parties shall file any re-submission papers with the Court by April 15, 2015. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Dawn Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)
